name: Catbotica Zodiac Badge #01 — Tiger
description: Year of the Tiger (2022, Water). Courage, Ambition, Unpredictability. A cybernetic mechanical tiger constructed from hard-surface metallic plates with jagged circuit-trace stripes and chrome fang blades. Issued during the inaugural Luck-Module Recalibration Protocol cycle. Part of The Celestial Cat-Circuit collection.

attributes.value: Jagged circuit-trace stripes, chrome fang blades
